zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Trigoz於1456年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特傑爾武德時，她的父親Richard Tregoz29歲，母親Margery Glyn29歲。她於1477年與Galfridus De Beauchamp在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Trigoz于1456年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特傑爾武德时，她的父亲Richard Tregoz29岁，母亲Margery Glyn29岁。她于1477年与Galfridus De Beauchamp在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年在英国英格兰賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trigoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alicia, Jorge, Manuel, Osvaldo, Alejandro, Benigno, Delfino, Jose, Julio, Luis, Roberto, Alberto.
Spanish and Portuguese: occupational name for a grower or seller of wheat, trigo.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Trigoz was born in 1456, in Chelwood, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Tregoz, was 29 and her mother, Margery Glyn, was 29. She married Galfridus De Beauchamp in 1477, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1485, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Trigoz est née en 1456, à Chelwood, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Tregoz, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margery Glyn, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Galfridus De Beauchamp en 1477, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1485, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Trigoz 1456 in Chelwood, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Tregoz 29 und ihre Mutter Margery Glyn 29. Sie hat 1477 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Galfridus De Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1485 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Trigoz è nata il nel 1456 nel Chelwood, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Tregoz, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margery Glyn, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Galfridus De Beauchamp nel 1477, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1485, nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Trigozが1456年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチェルウッドで生まれた時，父Richard Tregozは29歳，母Margery Glynは29歳であった。1477年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでGalfridus De Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Trigoz(이)가 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 헬우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Tregoz(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Glyn(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Galfridus De Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Trigoz родилась в 1456 г. в местности челвуд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Tregoz было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Glyn, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Galfridus De Beauchamp в 1477 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1485 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.
